scope: Minimum-Viable Formalization (MVF) ladder for HoTT consciousness equivalence

ladder.name: symmetry
ladder.statement: (c1 c2 : Conscious) → is_conscious_equivalent c1 c2 → is_conscious_equivalent c2 c1

ladder.name: transitivity
ladder.statement: (c1 c2 c3 : Conscious) → is_conscious_equivalent c1 c2 → is_conscious_equivalent c2 c3 → is_conscious_equivalent c1 c3
ladder.note: MVF1+MVF2+MVF3 = is_conscious_equivalent forms an equivalence relation (groupoid structure)

ladder.name: univalence_application_substrate_equivalence
ladder.statement: (s1 s2 : Substrate) → (G : G0_G7_satisfied s1 ∧ G0_G7_satisfied s2) → (e : realize s1 ≃ realize s2) → realize s1 = realize s2
ladder.note: 본 N-15 의 핵심 deliverable. G0-G7 PASS + substrate equivalence ⇒ conscious identity.

race_isolation: lean repo 별도, anima 본 repo 침범 0
